breaking.title: 2,700 Killed By Heatwaves Across England Between May And June: Study
breaking.summary: UK Health Security Agency will publish its official estimate of heat-related deaths in coming weeks

breaking.title: West Asia war LIVE: IRGC claims strikes against Oman and Bahrain
breaking.summary: Iran’s Revolutionary Guards said they destroyed radar systems in Oman and targeted U.S. military facilities on the southern edge of Manama

breaking.title: Efforts on to repatriate remains of three Andhra tourists killed in Vietnam boat accident
breaking.summary: The remains of Nallapeta Adiseshaiah Ravi Teja, Gelli Jaya Lakshmi and Mudium Sreedhar are to be flown home; the injured Gelli Kishore remains critical and may be moved to Ho Chi Minh City

breaking.title: U.S. hits Iran as Gulf states targeted in flare-up over Hormuz
breaking.summary: Iran responded to the latest U.S. attacks by targeting Gulf nations, with the powerful Revolutionary Guards announcing new strikes on Bahrain, Jordan and Kuwait, according to state media reports

breaking.title: When anti-cow slaughter mob tried to burn down Kamaraj’s house in New Delhi in 1966
breaking.summary: The Congress national president was having a siesta when the mob, taking out a rally to Parliament, attacked his residence on Jantar Mantar Road in New Delhi on November 7. The house was partly burnt. His cook, Ambi, was attacked with sticks and injured in the face. Kamaraj escaped to the adjoining Vithalbhai Hostel for MPs

breaking.title: At least 27 killed, 22 critically injured in Bangkok bar fire
breaking.summary: Firefighters arrived at the scene in the Chatuchak district to find patrons running through flames to escape.

breaking.title: Jordan says it shot down four missiles launched by Iran
breaking.summary: Iran earlier had claimed an attack targeting Jordan, which hosts U.S. military forces

breaking.title: 'We heard an explosion, then flames spread': Survivors recount Bangkok pub inferno that killed 27
breaking.summary: In a horrific incident, a raging fire swept through a crowded pub in Bangkok, resulting in the deaths of 27 individuals. Panic ensued as smoke enveloped the venue, with numerous victims cornered at the rear due to obstructed emergency exits. Eyewitnesses shared their desperate attempts to escape the chaos as the inferno blazed shortly before midnight.
